programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: When Frank decides to put the gang on 'Charlie Work' instead of Charlie, they get furious and try to change that. Since Charlie is now manager, the gang does various favors to get out of it. And at the same time Mac banged Dennis' mom and Dennis wants to get back at him by trying to bang Macs mom.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of the Corleone crime family tells the story of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in 1910s New York; and follows Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc:
Nicki Chapman helps a couple relocate to the Gloucestershire countryside with a healthy budget of £550,000 to spend.
While in the region, Nicki explores the extraordinary collection of an English eccentric.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Albaston in Torquay, owned by avid souvenir collectors Kevin and Julie Shadbolt, who own a startling menagerie of memorabilia.
